title: Enderman's Rubies
description: In this mod, you are able to find Ruby in the overworld. With those rubies, you can craft tools and weapons that will make netherite useless! There's not magic or strange things at all. Just rubies as they were imagined by Mojang!
body: In this mod, you are able to find Ruby in the overworld. With those rubies, you can craft tools and weapons that will make netherite useless! There's not magic or strange things at all. Just rubies as they were imagined by Mojang by Mojang! I want to say that this is my first mod. I know that it's very simple, but I like it. The mod is made in english, but it works also in italian ('cause it's my language.) If you downloaded it, I'd like to receive a feedback in the comment! ( :![Enderman's Rubies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d14c238f762fe07def378a8f425c23c019a7da1f.png)
